key_insights.insight: Understanding the menstrual cycle helps foster empathy and avoid misinterpreting mood swings.
key_insights.quote: Without this insight it's very easy to fall into the trap of just assuming your partner is moody or that they are they have like mood swings or that they're you know people say things like they're too emotional.

key_insights.insight: Estrogen levels influence verbal skills, making certain times of the cycle better for resolving conflict.
key_insights.quote: If you have something you want to resolve with us, make sure estrogen's there because estrogen makes us great, great verbal.

key_insights.insight: During the luteal phase (week before period), women may crave carbs due to increased glucose needs for progesterone production.
key_insights.quote: Glucose goes higher the week before our period. So we crave carbs. There's a reason we crave carbs because we need to bring glucose up to be able to make progesterone.

key_insights.insight: Ovulation is a period of heightened creativity and energy for women.
key_insights.quote: Ovulation is an amazing time to start a new business project...I'm going to write during those five days because my creativity is gonna be at its peak.

key_insights.insight: Libido is highest around ovulation due to increased testosterone levels.
key_insights.quote: That's when she's going to be her libido is going to be the highest...Day 10 to 15 of her cycle.

key_insights.insight: During the week before their period, women tend to be more introverted and irritable.
key_insights.quote: Like the week before our period, we're pretty, we're irritable. And every time I say that, men go, well, you said it. I didn't say it.

actionable_advice.how_to: Use an app like Clue and consider sharing the information to create shared understanding and empathy within a team.
Address difficult conversations during days 2-12 of the cycle when estrogen levels are higher.

actionable_advice.advice: Provide extra care and comfort during the luteal phase.
actionable_advice.how_to: Offer foot rubs and be extra attentive during days 17-18.

actionable_advice.advice: Schedule creative or business ventures during ovulation.
actionable_advice.how_to: Leverage the increased energy and creativity of ovulation to start new projects.

actionable_advice.advice: Be supportive and understanding during the week before the period.
actionable_advice.how_to: Offer simple gestures of love and support, avoid aggressive conflict, and allow for rest and slower pace.

memorable_stories: The story of the dad struggling to communicate with his teenage daughter until he learned about her cycle.
The speaker sharing that men often have very limited education about menstrual cycles.
contrarian_claims: Most women are ignorant about their own menstrual cycles.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Moment 166: What Men (& Women) NEED To Know About The Menstrual Cycle: Dr Mindy Pelz
